markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of the Navan client account and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Legal Process:** Navan has approved a new process to bypass legal review, unblocking content production. It requires linking to internal comparison pages for competitor data and using a specific disclaimer.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** The focus is now on bottom-of-funnel (BoFu) content, especially comparison listicles, to directly support the client's primary goal of reducing paid search spend.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:** Current efforts target two key areas: the "AI" cluster to support a new campaign and the "Expense" category to build authority where Navan is weak.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Internal Tracking:** Navan's SEO lead, Mehran, is tracking content performance in Amplitude. Erik must understand their attribution model (e.g., first-touch vs. last-touch) to align on KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

## Topics

### Client Strategy & Priorities

  - [**Primary Goal:** Reduce paid search spend by capturing BoFu traffic with organic content.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**BoFu:** Comparison listicles and vs. pages are the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**AI Cluster:** Supporting a new AI campaign with updated messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Expense Category:** Building authority with credit card-related keywords where Navan has a weak presence.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Client Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Target Market:** Enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Competitors:** Brex and Ramp are investing heavily in SEO; Navan avoids being seen in the same category as smaller players like Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Performance:** Early results show high average position rankings (often on page one) due to Navan's high domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### Content Production & Legal Process

  - [**Legal Review:** Now bypassed, removing the primary production bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**New Legal Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
      - [Substantiate all facts with Google Doc links.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
      - [Do not link directly to competitor websites.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
      - [Use internal comparison pages as the source for competitor data.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Include the disclaimer: "Competitive data was collected and subject to change or update."](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Artifact Creation:** Create an artifact from Navan's comparison pages (e.g., screenshots) to serve as a pre-approved data source for content.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [**Cluster-Level Value Props/CTAs:** Programmatically inserts tailored CTAs based on content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [**Statistics Artifact:** Populates articles with data from Navan's gated reports to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [**Priority:** New content publication for the next month.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Low Priority:** Glossary content refresh (AI-generated, awareness-focused).](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Future Focus:** Refreshing blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Data Source:** GSC clicks and GA4 demo events.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Selection Criteria:** Commercial intent and significant traffic loss.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik to update the refresh candidate list with new GSC data in \~1 month.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### Client Management & Feedback

  - [**Feedback Style:** Navan's content team (Rich, Libby) provides line edits but rarely gives high-level strategic feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Action:** Erik must proactively solicit feedback to ensure content quality and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Nima (Decision-Maker):**](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Expectation:** Expects free Check That access, as it was presented as part of the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Inquiry:** Asked about the search volume of Check That prompts; Erik should be prepared to explain the "black box" nature of LLMs and the strategy of targeting simple, BoFu queries.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Internal Team & Content Quality

  - [**Content Quality Issue:** Victor's content sometimes has "AI-isms" or overly complex phrasing.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [**Action:** Erik to follow up with Sydney, the sprint editor, for specific feedback to improve Victor's writing before Sydney's editing role ends.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Create the comparison page artifact (or delegate to Victor) by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Confirm Navan's attribution model (e.g., first-touch, last-touch) with Mehran.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Request Navan's current paid keyword list to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
      - [Follow up with Sydney for specific feedback to improve Victor's writing.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Proactively solicit high-level feedback from Rich and Libby on content quality and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [Update the content refresh candidate list with new GSC data in \~1 month.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
      - [Coordinate with Andy to manage Nima's expectation of free Check That access.](https://fathom.video/share/XmYGQsGHfAZ7uGxn8YeQyejYSxzT4iXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
